## compute() function

Creates a new store that subscribes itself to all specified parent stores through a one-way binding. If one of the parent stores dispatches an update, the new store recomputes itself automatically and will notify its subscribers of the change.

**Signature:**

```typescript
declare function compute<T, U>(store: Store<T>, callback: (value: T) => U): WritableStore<U>;
```
